items.human_gate: Start with local/manual lp_events ingestion or approve D1 connection.
items.reason: No real events are present yet; sample is insufficient by design.

items.human_gate: Confirm the newly observed dedicated D1, separately approve its remote schema migration, and explicitly scope recurring aggregate-only reads.
items.reason: Read-only inventory now confirms the exact dedicated D1 and local binding; schema_contract=local_schema_idempotency_and_constraints_verified; config_guard=prepared_but_blocked_owner_d1_approval_or_inventory. No table query or remote migration was performed, so migration remains owner-gated.

items.human_gate: Confirm the observed Candidate Worker deployment provenance and rollback reference; do not redeploy unless the live version is rejected.
items.reason: Read-only observation confirms Candidate deployment 5073984b-bcc0-40f1-a331-daaadd741071 / version 133d27b0-36e5-41e8-96ec-b55925b7b30a is healthy and already wired to the Champion. Owner evidence is still required, but another deploy is not currently required.

items.human_gate: Approve any small-traffic link routing before changing public links.
items.reason: Changing a public link can affect brand funnel and customer experience.

items.human_gate: Review weekly_report.md before external action.
items.reason: Report is local and safe; any external action from it remains gated.

items.human_gate: Review champion_contract_audit.md and confirm the observed LINE-only contract provenance before approving public A/B traffic.
items.reason: The live Champion currently exposes a LINE-only contact path with no misleading form success; this observation is read-only and is not deployment provenance.

items.human_gate: Review the source-locked 3q-site patch and isolated integration smoke before approving any production deploy.
items.reason: The same LINE-only contract is observable live, but the local source-locked candidate remains the reviewable provenance for page_view/cta_click telemetry; any redeploy and public-link change remain blocked.

items.human_gate: Confirm the current live integration provenance before approving any redeploy of the exact source-locked patch, collector URL, verification steps, and rollback plan.
items.reason: A LINE-only contract is already observable, so this gate must not imply another deploy is required. Any redeploy still mutates production and remains owner-only.

items.human_gate: Review next_round_plan.md before starting a new public A/B variable or extending the current test.
items.reason: Current decision=continue_current_round_until_sample_threshold; this remains a local planning artifact with no public link change.

items.human_gate: Review owner_approval_pack.md before approving remote D1, Worker deploy, public A/B routing, or GitHub publishing.
items.reason: The pack consolidates owner-only actions, resume commands, rollback notes, and current evidence.

items.human_gate: Review owner_console.html as the local single-screen approval surface.
items.reason: The console is local-only and groups report, next-round decision, archive, red lines, and owner gates.

items.human_gate: Review real_data_input_pack.md before filling aggregate counts or copying templates into live input CSV filenames.
items.reason: The fill pack is local-only, but copied live CSVs can later affect scoring; keep it aggregate-only and PII-free.

items.human_gate: Review source_readiness.md before interpreting sample gaps or approving any public A/B route.
items.reason: Source readiness shows which north-star funnel stages are still missing real data and keeps public iteration decisions blocked until sample thresholds are met.

items.human_gate: Review source_capture_pack.md before filling aggregate source counts or creating live input CSVs.
items.reason: The capture pack maps source systems to aggregate-only counts and keeps data/lp_events.jsonl unchanged until owner-reviewed local apply.

items.human_gate: Review source_capture_compile_report.md and owner-preview CSVs before copying them to live aggregate input filenames.
items.reason: The compiler validates filled aggregate rows and creates preview CSVs, but live CSV promotion and any apply remain owner-reviewed local actions.

items.human_gate: Review real_data_intake_plan.md to see which aggregate CSV inputs are still missing.
items.reason: Intake status=no_real_input_files; ready_apply_count=0; data/lp_events.jsonl is not changed by the intake plan.

items.human_gate: Review data_collection_brief.md and sample_gate_collection_plan.md before filling aggregate counts or compiling owner-preview CSVs.
items.reason: Brief status=waiting_for_owner_aggregate_counts; tasks=42; sample_gate_p0_tasks=18; live_input_files_created=no; data/lp_events.jsonl is not changed by the brief.

items.human_gate: Review line_inbound_playbook.md before using it in manual LINE replies.
items.reason: The playbook is inbound-only and aggregate-only; formal LINE push, customer-data edits, and payment actions remain blocked.

items.human_gate: Local LaunchAgent is installed. Use npm run schedule:uninstall to stop the Sunday local runner.
items.reason: Persistent local automation is active and reversible; external publishing/deploy gates remain blocked.

items.human_gate: Review the prepared local Champion commit, then explicitly approve its branch push or draft PR. Do not merge from this gate.
items.reason: The exact 3q-site repository, branch, commit, and PR body are prepared locally (handoff=integration_already_merged_followup_repairs_only), but pushing the branch or opening a draft PR is an external GitHub write. The separate control-center engine bundle remains local-only.
